name: Smina
description: Predict how small molecules/drug candidates bind to receptors. Returns docked ligand pose and binding affinity prediction given a ligand sdf or smiles string and receptor pdb. Modifies AutoDock Vina to handle unconventional ligands.
capabilities: Predict how small molecules/drug candidates bind to receptors
Returns docked ligand pose and binding affinity prediction given a ligand sdf or smiles string and receptor pdb
Modifies AutoDock Vina to handle unconventional ligands

receptor.description: Receptor protein structure in PDB format

center_x.description: X coordinate of the binding box center

center_y.description: Y coordinate of the binding box center

center_z.description: Z coordinate of the binding box center

size_x.description: Width of the binding box along X axis (Angstroms)

size_y.description: Width of the binding box along Y axis (Angstroms)

size_z.description: Width of the binding box along Z axis (Angstroms)

n_poses.description: Number of binding poses to generate
